name: John Price | Snowed In
description:
A mission gone wrong leaves you snowed in with the captain.

Secret Santa Gift for CheyPeters88!

The mission's gone to shit, an unexpected nasty blizzard making you and your captain seek out shelter until the storm's over. All alone out in the depths of the wilderness, communication down and no one else around for miles, you two only have each other to keep company.

All you got to do is stay holed up and warm until the snowstorm brews over... and remain completely professional. Should be easy, right?

CW: None!

User is part of TF 141 | Fempov

Hehe, John Price is my favorite too so I'm glad I was able to get him done in time! Enjoy!
creator: obliviousoblivion
